meta.title: Indian Startup Graveyard 2015-2026
meta.description: A comprehensive memorial to Indian startups that burned bright and crashed hard

startups.name: Byju's
startups.failureReason: Debt crisis, multiple lawsuits, insolvency proceedings, governance issues
startups.investors: Prosus, Tiger Global, General Atlantic, Sequoia

startups.name: Udaan
startups.failureReason: Massive losses, down rounds, layoffs, pivot struggles

startups.name: Zepto
startups.failureReason: Cash burn concerns, competition from Blinkit/Instamart

startups.name: Pharmeasy
startups.failureReason: IPO shelved, valuation crashed from $5.6B to $700M, layoffs

startups.name: ShareChat (Major Crisis)
startups.failureReason: 500+ layoffs, shut down fantasy gaming, valuation crash

startups.name: Cars24
startups.failureReason: International exit, heavy layoffs, valuation drop

startups.name: Unacademy
startups.failureReason: Continuous layoffs, shut down group companies, pivot struggles

startups.name: Ola Electric (Crisis)
startups.failureReason: Service issues, regulatory problems, stock crash post-IPO

startups.name: BharatPe (Founder Exit)
startups.failureReason: Founder ousted for fraud, governance crisis, lawsuits

startups.name: Curefit (Cult.fit)
startups.failureReason: Layoffs, shut down food vertical, gym closures

startups.name: Good Glamm Group (Crisis)
startups.failureReason: Heavy debt, founder exit, brand shutdowns, layoffs

startups.name: Grofers (Rebranded)
startups.failureReason: Massive pivot to Blinkit after years of losses

startups.name: Dunzo
startups.failureReason: Cash crunch, failed Reliance acquisition talks, massive layoffs

startups.name: Zilingo
startups.failureReason: Accounting fraud, CEO fired, company liquidated

startups.name: AskMe
startups.failureReason: Investor Astro Holdings pulled out, massive shutdown

startups.name: PhysicsWallah (Alakh Pandey Crisis)
startups.failureReason: Centers shutting down, layoffs, profitability issues

startups.name: WhiteHat Jr (Crisis)
startups.failureReason: Byju's acquisition led to layoffs, brand struggling

startups.name: Vedantu (Layoffs)
startups.failureReason: Mass layoffs, funding crunch, pivot attempts

startups.name: Purplle
startups.failureReason: Layoffs, profitability pressure, competition from Nykaa

startups.name: Jabong
startups.failureReason: Brand discontinued after Flipkart acquisition of Myntra

startups.name: Taxiforsure
startups.failureReason: Acquired by Ola for $200M, brand discontinued

startups.name: BluSmart
startups.failureReason: Financial irregularities, founder fraud allegations, operations suspended
startups.investors: BP Ventures, Responsiblity, Green Frontier Capital

startups.name: Uber Eats India
startups.failureReason: Sold to Zomato, exited India food delivery market

startups.name: LEAD School
startups.failureReason: Mass layoffs, business model struggles, funding winter
startups.investors: WestBridge Capital, Elevar Equity, GSV Ventures

startups.name: Droom (IPO Failed)
startups.failureReason: IPO shelved multiple times, heavy losses

startups.name: Housing.com (Crisis)
startups.failureReason: CEO Rahul Yadav fired, company later sold to Proptech group

startups.name: Foodpanda India
startups.failureReason: Ola sold Foodpanda, couldn't compete with Swiggy/Zomato

startups.name: Trell
startups.failureReason: Shut down app, failed pivot, couldn't compete with Instagram/YouTube

startups.name: PepperTap
startups.failureReason: Hyperlocal grocery model unsustainable, shut down operations

startups.name: Yepme
startups.failureReason: Failed to compete, shifted to B2B model

startups.name: Stayzilla
startups.failureReason: Shut down amid legal troubles, founder arrested

startups.name: Staples India
startups.failureReason: Shut Indian operations after years of losses

startups.name: TinyOwl
startups.failureReason: Acquired by Runnr after massive layoffs, effectively shut
startups.investors: Sequoia Capital, Matrix Partners, Nexus VP

startups.name: Mojocare
startups.failureReason: Shut down operations, failed to raise follow-on funding

startups.name: LocalBanya
startups.failureReason: Ran out of funds, couldn't compete in hyperlocal space

startups.name: Fashionara
startups.failureReason: Failed to compete with Myntra, Jabong; shut down

startups.name: Dazo
startups.failureReason: Food delivery startup shut down amid intense competition

startups.name: Frankly.me
startups.failureReason: Celebrity video Q&A platform failed to monetize

startups.name: Spoonjoy
startups.failureReason: Food tech startup couldn't scale, shut operations

startups.name: Autowale
startups.failureReason: Auto-rickshaw booking app shut due to unit economics

startups.name: ShopClues (decline)
startups.failureReason: Sold at massive loss to Qoo10

startups.name: Grofers (pivoted)
startups.failureReason: Rebranded to Blinkit, sold to Zomato
